name: TRATON SE
description: TRATON SE, a subsidiary of Volkswagen AG, is one of the world's leading commercial vehicle manufacturers. The company operates through its prominent brands, including Scania, MAN, International (formerly Navistar), and Volkswagen Truck & Bus. TRATON offers a comprehensive range of light-duty commercial vehicles, trucks, and buses, alongside digital services and financial solutions. Headquartered in Munich, Germany, the group is dedicated to transforming the transportation sector through sustainable, innovative, and efficient transport solutions.
